dental: Family and cosmetic dental practice serving the local community for over a decade. Comprehensive care from preventive cleanings to advanced implant work. Known for a calming, no pressure environment and same week emergency appointments.
plumbing: Full service residential and light commercial plumbing. Specialties include slab leak detection, tankless water heater installation, sewer scopes, and emergency repairs. Licensed, bonded, insured, and on call after hours.
fitness: Boutique strength and conditioning studio with capped class sizes and individualized programming. Coaches hold national level certifications. Programs designed for beginners through advanced athletes.
real_estate: Boutique real estate brokerage with a hyperlocal focus. Buyer and seller representation, investment property analysis, and relocation services. Senior agents average 12 years in market.
auto: Independent auto repair shop with ASE certified technicians. Specialties include European imports, diesel trucks, transmission service, and electrical diagnostics. Honest estimates, OEM parts when it matters.
legal: Full service family law and estate planning practice. Mediation focused divorce, custody modifications, prenuptial agreements, wills, trusts, and probate. Free 30 minute initial consultations.
accounting: Tax and accounting practice serving small businesses and self employed professionals. Quarterly tax planning, bookkeeping clean up, S corp elections, and audit representation. Year round client relationships.
landscaping: Design build landscape firm covering installation, maintenance, hardscape, and irrigation. Native plant specialists. Seasonal contracts and one time projects.
restaurant: Chef driven neighborhood restaurant with seasonal menus and ingredients sourced from regional farms. Full bar program, private dining room for events, and catering for off site gatherings.
veterinary: AAHA accredited small animal hospital. Wellness, dentistry, surgery, urgent care, and end of life support. Senior pet specialty programs and behavioral consults.
contracting: General contracting and remodeling firm with a focus on residential additions, kitchen and bathroom remodels, and full home renovations. Licensed, bonded, and insured. Detailed timelines, transparent pricing.
photography: Lifestyle and portrait photography studio. Specialties include weddings, family sessions, branding and headshots, and editorial work. Studio and on location.
hvac: Residential HVAC sales, installation, and service. Heat pumps, furnaces, ductless mini splits, and indoor air quality. Maintenance plans available with priority service tier.
education: One on one tutoring and academic coaching K through college. Subjects across math, sciences, language arts, test prep, and study skills. Executive function coaching for middle and high school.
beauty: Full service hair salon and beauty studio. Color, cut, extensions, lashes, brows, skin care, and nails. Bridal and event services. Education forward stylists who refresh skills annually.
beverage: Craft brewery and taproom with a rotating tap list and bottled cellar releases. Tours weekly. Private event space for groups up to 80. Family and dog friendly outdoor patio.
health: Functional medicine and integrative wellness clinic. Hormone testing, gut health, IV therapy, acupuncture, and nutrition counseling. Root cause approach with lab driven personalization.
retail: Independent boutique carrying women's apparel, jewelry, gifts, and home goods. Locally curated collection, sustainable brands prioritized. Personal styling by appointment, free local delivery.
